# F045 Active Operator Wrapper

## Decision
`F045_ACTIVE_OPERATOR_WRAPPER_HELDOUT_BELOW_FLOOR`

## Purpose
F044 cooled the Action-AdaLN residual path because its tiny-cap signal was unstable. F045 tests the exact floor-initialized operator wrapper, which preserves the local ridge floor at zero residual scale, on the active multiseed latent benchmark.

## Selection Rule
`exact floor-initialized operator wrapper; train-only small-cap continuous scale selection from {0, 0.025, 0.05}; held-out scoring after selection only`

## Mean Metrics
- selected residual scale mean: `0.050000`
- selected nonzero fraction: `1.000000`
- heldout local floor preserved: `False`
- active gates pass: `True`
- selected transition: `0.011110`
- floor transition: `0.011281`
- selected delta cosine: `0.450492`
- floor delta cosine: `0.451515`
- selected recall@1: `0.333333`
- floor recall@1: `0.333333`
- selected floor gap transition: `-0.000171` (min `-0.000499`)
- selected floor gap delta cosine: `-0.001023` (min `-0.005112`)
- selected floor gap recall: `0.000000` (min `-0.037037`)
- max broken retrieval rows: `1`
- mean action-negative gap: `0.003289`

No model is promoted. F045 is a Tier 1 frozen-latent operator-wrapper diagnostic.
